subcodes.first_line: O Ghulam-'Ali! The Wronged One Who hath appeared through His Name, the Self-Subsisting, calleth unto thee from the direction of His Prison [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا غلامعلی حق مظلوم الذی ظهر باسمه القیوم از شطر سجن ترا ندا مینماید و
